proof_boundary: This artifact certifies only the listed disjoint first-summand real-t blocks. It does not prove a continuous lower bridge, a full-kernel curvature theorem, the endpoint tail, delayed entry, RH, or Lambda<=0.

rows.claim: Selected guarded tenth-tile H2-H24 collars and exact half-grid point jets support the scaling test.

rows.formula: 15 selected anchors; Taylor order 7; common remainder order 8

rows.claim: Every reported pass or failure is a rigorous real-interval enclosure on its selected block.
rows.proof_boundary: No interval between selected anchors is covered.

rows.claim: The first selected passing anchors identify economical candidate regime changes.
The scout does not compose its disjoint blocks into a continuum bridge.
rows.proof_boundary: A complete adaptive cache or analytic envelope is still required.
